mapper.select: SELECT uap.uid AS uid, uap.pid AS pid, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.difficulty_rating, 0), 1200) AS difficultyRating, COUNT(j.submit_id) AS attempts FROM user_acproblem uap INNER JOIN problem p ON p.id = uap.pid INNER JOIN judge j ON j.uid = uap.uid AND j.pid = uap.pid AND j.cid = 0 AND j.submit_id <= uap.submit_id GROUP BY uap.uid, uap.pid
